title: Any gay guys here who are into Eva
display_title: Any gay guys here who are into Eva
wikitext:
[]: Any gay guys here who are into Eva?             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Mon Nov 25, 2013 6:21 pm I'm not sure if a question like this is allowed on this forum,but I was just wondering if there was anyone here who shared (or had similar one to) my perspective both in life and on the single greatest anime of all time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 25, 2013 6:29 pm At least two other posters on this forum have made it plain that they are gay, so the answer to your headline question is "yes".

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Nov 25, 2013 6:38 pm I'm gay and I'm so into Eva, that it's my favorite anime.......A long side with Sailor Moon.

[]:             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Mon Nov 25, 2013 6:40 pm That is so awesome! Do you think Kaworu is hot? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Nov 25, 2013 7:23 pm Kaworu is "cute" but not hot for me. I'm more of the Toji variant.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Nov 25, 2013 8:25 pm SawItAtAge10 wrote: Do you think Kaworu is hot? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Nov 25, 2013 8:38 pm SawItAtAge10 wrote: Do you think Kaworu is hot? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon Nov 25, 2013 9:38 pm Kaworu turned me a little gay I guess, but we're all a little gay.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Nov 25, 2013 10:05 pm CJD wrote: Not gay but I just want to say that I love that this was what you went to immediately.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Mon Nov 25, 2013 10:11 pm I must be the only girl who hates the whole Kaworu x Shinji thing. Sorry, but I'll take Shinji over Kaworu any day. Now, pairing guys together for fun because they get along so well that's more of my thing. Disclaimer: All shipping is final, so it is said, so it shall be.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Nov 25, 2013 10:17 pm Yeah I actually genuinely don't get how even yaoi fangirls could find the whole Shinji-Kaworu thing erotic. It just reads as kind of uncanny and awkward to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Mon Nov 25, 2013 10:23 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Yeah I actually genuinely don't get how even yaoi fangirls could find the whole Shinji-Kaworu thing erotic. It just reads as kind of uncanny and awkward to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 25, 2013 11:24 pm To answer the OP, plenty of us forum members belong to different colors of the rainbow: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7740/GLBTQ-Otaku-Represent/

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Nov 26, 2013 9:57 am If it comes down to sexual preferences, I'm as gay as someone can get. Yet, I hate to label myself as gay, because I don't see myself as a typical stereotype gay man. I might have some dandyisms going on, but on the whole, I despise the gay stereotype, and try everything to not fall into the gay-pit. Maybe that's why people are often astounded when I "come out of the closet". So I refrain from telling it straight away, especially to guys. Because much too often I made the experience, that guys can't handle that fact well, which they would never admit though. Some friends even distanced themselves from me, because they are unable to cope with the fact, that I could be sexually interested in them. Well, that's enough for my tragic experiences living with gayDNA. Kaworu-Shin... Well, I'm not sexually attracted to them in any way, because they are both kids, and are drawn respectively. Yet, I love the personality of Kaworu, so if he was grown up, maybe...? But if I had to choose some guy to love from the cast, it would be Kaiji, obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Tue Nov 26, 2013 11:12 am As an in-the-closet married man, I definitely see the allure of Kaworu. In fact, my first gay experience was with someone who genuinely reminded me of (Rebuild) Kaworu. He was a musician with a higher sense of existence than every one else around me, and in my depressive state and surrounded by a less-than-fulfilling relationship with a woman (my wife), I found solace in him.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Nov 26, 2013 11:39 am Kaji is hot too. Hell, I'd even say Gendo, despite the more unpleasant aspects of his character.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue Nov 26, 2013 12:49 pm @robersora: C'mon man, any intelligent person can (or, should) recognize that homosexuality and flamboyant gay stereotypes don't by definition go hand-in-hand. There are tons of gay men who aren't "fabulous". It's really nothing to be ashamed of. @merkaba: Jesus dude, sounds like you have some stuff to... work out.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Nov 26, 2013 1:28 pm Rei IV wrote: I'm gay and I'm so into Eva, that it's my favorite anime.......A long side with Sailor Moon.

[]:             Quote Post by Gorbatschow » Tue Nov 26, 2013 2:01 pm I'm Bisexual (60m/40w)if that counts as gay. Because it kinda got a thing already: Shinji / Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Alpha » Tue Nov 26, 2013 2:24 pm Gay, though not flaboyant. At all. Eva is my favorite anime of all time. The only one I bother to collect merchandise of. Personally, Kaworu represent a lkind of undying love that is not real for us humans. His love is more pure than earthly desires.... But yes, he's incredibly hot, in my opinnion. I know, I just said he represents a higher form of love, but I am still human with lower forms of attraction as an imperative..
summary:
[]: Any gay guys here who are into Eva?             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Mon Nov 25, 2013 6:21 pm I'm not sure if a question like this is allowed on this forum,but I was just wondering if there was anyone here who shared (or had similar one to) my perspective both in life and on the single greatest anime of all time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon No
